title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, co-founders of Corgi, raised a $108M Series A by rebuilding the insurance industry from first principles rather than modernizing legacy carriers. The interview discusses their principle of pursuing the most ambitious version of an idea, the regulatory challenges they overcame, and how time and deep focus create defensible competitive moats.
